title: World launches tool to verify humans behind AI shopping agents
summary: As AI agents take the reins for online shoppers, Sam Altman's unconventional startup is looking to expand its verification offerings to support agentic commerce.

title: MacBook Neo, AirPods Max 2, iPhone 17e, and everything else Apple announced this month
summary: From a new iPhone to a budget-friendly MacBook, Apple announced a series of new products this week.

title: Niv-AI exits stealth to wring more power performance out of GPUs
summary: The company raised $12 million in seed funding to measure and manage GPU power surges.

title: H&M wants to make clothing from CO2 using this startup’s tech
summary: Rubi has developed an enzymatic process to turn carbon dioxide into cellulose that's ready to be spun into lyocell or viscose.

title: Gamma adds AI image generation tools in bid to take on Canva and Adobe
summary: The company's new product, called Gamma Imagine, will let users employ text prompts to create brand-specific assets like interactive charts and visualizations, marketing collateral, social graphics, and infographics.

title: Amazon adds 1-hour and 3-hour delivery options in the US
summary: Amazon Prime subscribers will be charged $9.99 for one-hour delivery and $4.99 for three-hour delivery. If you don't have a Prime subscription, you'll pay $19.99 for one-hour delivery and $14.99 for three-hour delivery.

title: Gecko Robotics lands the largest U.S. Navy robotics deal yet
summary: Gecko Robotics inked a five-year deal to help the U.S. Navy monitor and predict needed maintenance on its fleet of ships.

title: Picsart now allows creators to ‘hire’ AI assistants through agent marketplace
summary: Picsart's AI agent marketplace will launch with four agents, then add more agents each week.

title: SEC eyes shift to twice-yearly earnings reports
summary: The SEC is working on a proposal to allow public companies to release earnings reports twice a year instead of quarterly, per the WSJ.

title: Nvidia’s version of OpenClaw could solve its biggest problem: security
summary: Nvidia announced an open enterprise AI agent platform, called NemoClaw, that is built off of viral OpenClaw.

title: Jensen Huang just put Nvidia’s Blackwell and Vera Rubin sales projections into the $1 trillion stratosphere
summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang said he expects $1 trillion worth of orders for the chips.

title: Warren presses Pentagon over decision to grant xAI access to classified networks
summary: Sen. Elizabeth Warren noted that Grok, xAI's controversial chatbot, has created harmful outputs for users and poses a potential national security risk.

title: Memories AI is building the visual memory layer for wearables and robotics
summary: Memories.ai is building a large visual memory model that can index and retrieve video-recorded memories for physical AI.

title: Samsung bets this island startup can tame the grid with software and batteries
summary: GridBeyond's hardware and software coordinates several gigawatts of supply and demand to help balance the flow of electricity on the grid. The idea has attracted investors like Samsung Ventures.

title: Apple acquires video editing software company MotionVFX
summary: The move could help Apple better compete with Adobe Premiere Pro and the Adobe Creative Cloud suite.

title: Elon Musk’s xAI faces child porn lawsuit from minors Grok allegedly undressed
summary: The three plaintiffs are seeking to represent anyone who had real images of them as a minor altered into sexual content by Grok.

title: Nvidia’s DLSS 5 uses generative AI to boost photorealism in video games, with ambitions beyond gaming
summary: Nvidia’s new DLSS 5 uses generative AI and structured graphics data to make video games more realistic. CEO Jensen Huang says the approach could eventually spread to other industries.

title: The MacBook Neo is ‘the most repairable MacBook’ in years, according to iFixit
summary: Apple’s new MacBook Neo isn’t just the most affordable MacBook — it’s also the company's most repairable laptop in “about fourteen years."

title: How to watch Jensen Huang’s Nvidia GTC 2026 keynote — and what to expect

title: Another deep tech chip startup becomes a unicorn: Frore hits $1.64B
